scripts.text:
TRUNCATE TABLE STG_CUSTOMER_ORDERS;

INSERT INTO STG_CUSTOMER_ORDERS
SELECT
    c.CustomerID,
    c.CustomerName,
    o.OrderID,
    o.OrderDate,
    o.Amount
FROM local.Customers c
JOIN local.Orders o
    ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID;

CREATE TABLE dbo.STG_CUSTOMER_TOTALS
(
    CustomerID INT,
    CustomerName VARCHAR(100),
    TotalSales DECIMAL(10,2),
    OrderCount INT
);

TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.STG_CUSTOMER_TOTALS;

INSERT INTO dbo.STG_CUSTOMER_TOTALS
SELECT
    CustomerID,
    CustomerName,
    SUM(Amount) AS TotalSales,
    COUNT(*) AS OrderCount
FROM dbo.STG_CUSTOMER_ORDERS
GROUP BY
    CustomerID,
    CustomerName;
